testcase.name: test_various_simple_assertions[def test():\n self.assertIs(a, b)\n-a is b]
test_various_simple_assertions[def test():\n self.assertIsNot(x, y)\n-x is not y]
test_various_simple_assertions[def test():\n self.assertIn(item, coll)\n-item in coll]
test_various_simple_assertions[def test():\n self.assertNotIn(item2, coll2)\n-item2 not in coll2]
test_msg_and_is_none_variants[def test():\n self.assertEqual(a, b, msg='oops')\n-a == b]
test_msg_and_is_none_variants[def test():\n self.assertIsNotNone(y)\n-y is not None]
test_almost_equal_extra_permutations[def test():\n self.assertAlmostEqual(a, b, delta=0.5, places=2)\n-expected_contains0]
test_boolean_and_membership_msg_dropped[def test():\n self.assertNotIn(x2, y2, msg='m')\n-x2 not in y2]
